entries.english: I can / I am able to
you can / you are able to
he can / he is able to
she can / she is able to
you can / you are able to (formal)
we can / we are able to
they can / they are able to
you all can / you all are able to
I could / I was able to
you could / you were able to
he could / he was able to
she could / she was able to
you could / you were able to (formal)
we could / we were able to
they could / they were able to

you will be able to
he will be able to
she will be able to

entries.spanish: Puedo ir a la iglesia este domingo.
entries.english: I can go to church this Sunday.
Can you take me to the airport?
Can we see the menu?
I can't find my keys.

entries.spanish: Mi abuela no puede caminar bien.
entries.english: My grandmother can't walk well.

entries.spanish: Mi perro puede aprender trucos nuevos.
entries.english: My dog can learn new tricks.
Can you help me with my homework?
I can't sleep well lately.

entries.spanish: ¿Pueden ustedes terminar el proyecto para el viernes?
entries.english: Can you all finish the project by Friday?

entries.spanish: Puedo jugar al fútbol los sábados.
entries.english: I can play soccer on Saturdays.
Can we change the hotel reservation?

entries.spanish: El pastor puede hablar tres idiomas.
entries.english: The pastor can speak three languages.

entries.spanish: Pude cambiar mi vuelo sin problema.
entries.english: I was able to change my flight without any problem.

entries.spanish: No pudimos ir al servicio el domingo pasado.
entries.english: We were not able to go to the service last Sunday.
Were you able to order dessert?

entries.spanish: Mi papá pudo arreglar el lavaplatos.
entries.english: My dad was able to fix the dishwasher.

entries.spanish: Mis primos no pudieron venir a la reunión familiar.
entries.english: My cousins were not able to come to the family gathering.

entries.spanish: Mi gato no pudo salir afuera ayer.
entries.english: My cat was not able to go outside yesterday.

entries.spanish: Pude terminar el examen a tiempo.
entries.english: I was able to finish the exam on time.

entries.spanish: No pude ir al médico porque trabajé todo el día.
entries.english: I was not able to go to the doctor because I worked all day.

entries.spanish: Pudimos terminar el informe antes de la reunión.
entries.english: We were able to finish the report before the meeting.
Were you able to learn to swim this summer?

entries.spanish: ¿Podrás viajar a Guatemala el próximo año?
entries.english: Will you be able to travel to Guatemala next year?

entries.spanish: Podremos ir al retiro de la iglesia en agosto.
entries.english: We will be able to go to the church retreat in August.

entries.spanish: ¿Podrán ustedes hacernos una reservación para diez personas?
entries.english: Will you all be able to make us a reservation for ten people?

entries.spanish: Podré limpiar el garaje este fin de semana.
entries.english: I will be able to clean the garage this weekend.

entries.spanish: Mis tíos podrán visitarnos en diciembre.
entries.english: My aunt and uncle will be able to visit us in December.

entries.spanish: El veterinario podrá ver a mi perro mañana.
entries.english: The vet will be able to see my dog tomorrow.

entries.spanish: ¿Podrás terminar el proyecto para el lunes?
entries.english: Will you be able to finish the project by Monday?

entries.spanish: El doctor podrá darte los resultados la próxima semana.
entries.english: The doctor will be able to give you the results next week.

entries.spanish: Podremos contratar más empleados el próximo trimestre.
entries.english: We will be able to hire more employees next quarter.

entries.spanish: ¿Podrás ir al partido de fútbol el sábado?
entries.english: Will you be able to go to the soccer game on Saturday?
